basic_details.job_title: MSACS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Maharashtra State AIDS Control Society Mumbai (MSACS)
basic_details.short_information: Maharashtra State AIDS Control Society Mumbai (MSACS) Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 26 June 2026 on the official website https://www.msacs.org.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MSACS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with valid registration from the respective State Medical Council/NMC
qualification.details: MBBS with valid registration from the respective State Medical Council/NMC

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MSACS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MSACS Medical Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MSACS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MSACS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MSACS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MSACS Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the MSACS Medical Officer recruitment is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with a valid registration from the respective State Medical Council or the National Medical Commission (NMC) to be eligible for the Medical Officer position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Officer post is 60 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Medical Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 72,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Medical Officer post in the Maharashtra State AIDS Control Society Mumbai (MSACS) recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the MSACS Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the MSACS Medical Officer recruitment will involve a Written Examination followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Admin/Contract/Recruit./2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for this Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The job location for this Medical Officer post is Alibag, Maharashtra, with a pincode of 402201.
